2024-10-18.thesis: Amazon nuclear-power investment deal ignites SMR stocks
2024-10-18.exit_case: Amazon SMR deal was announced Oct 16 — the discrete signing already occurred and is public
2024-10-18.assessment: Entry week. Amazon's nuclear investment (Oct 16) ignited uranium and SMR names — CCJ exploded as IBD Stock of the Day, Oklo/Altman soared ~100% MTD, URA went vertical, DNN popped. This is a structural AI-power-demand catalyst, not a one-off: tech giants are serially signing nuclear deals, each a new milestone. Coverage is heating but not yet mainstream-saturated, and no single concrete next catalyst has closed the arc. Keep the full same-catalyst basket: CCJ and DNN (uranium supply), OKLO and SMR (pure-play SMR developers), URA (sector ETF).
2024-10-18.exit_advice: Hold — the Amazon deal is the trigger for a broader Big-Tech nuclear/SMR buildout (Google, Microsoft, Altman's Oklo) that keeps throwing off fresh milestones; still early despite this week's surge.

2024-11-01.thesis: Amazon nuclear-power investment deal ignites SMR stocks
2024-11-01.exit_case: No reversal — no ceasefire equivalent; AI-power driver still in force, but Amazon deal itself is public and coverage now mainstream-saturated
2024-11-01.assessment: Structural AI-electricity driver still live and no reversal, so this is not a hard exit. But this week the coverage tipped decisively mainstream: 'parabolic run just getting started,' 'JPMorgan says load up,' 'Nvidia CEO bullish, will it join?,' '7 names to watch.' That is retail/sell-side frenzy — the herd has largely arrived, and the specific Amazon deal is fully public. No new CONCRETE scheduled tech-nuclear deal is named ahead, only speculation (will Nvidia invest?). Driver hasn't reversed so I keep the basket live, but the early edge is spent and the move is now consensus, so I step conviction down toward the cull floor. Keep full same-catalyst basket.
2024-11-01.exit_advice: Hold the structural AI-nuclear driver — no counter-event has reversed it — but fade conviction as coverage saturates.

2024-11-08.thesis: Amazon nuclear-power investment deal ignites SMR stocks
2024-11-08.exit_case: FERC regulators REJECTED the Amazon-Talen data-center nuclear deal — the exact catalyst that ignited this basket has reversed; stocks sliding.
2024-11-08.assessment: The catalyst I entered on — Amazon's nuclear-power deal igniting SMR/uranium names — hit a hard reversal: FERC rejected the plan to fuel the Amazon data center from the Talen plant, and nuclear power stocks are explicitly falling because of it. This is the concrete COUNTER-event, not a quiet stretch: the specific deal is denied, not pending. Combined with last week's fully-arrived herd (parabolic/JPM-load-up framing), both exit conditions converge. While the broader AI-electricity structural theme persists, THIS catalyst has resolved against the trade. Close the basket.
2024-11-08.exit_advice: Exit. The specific Amazon nuclear deal that lit this trade was voted down by regulators on Nov 5 — a concrete counter-event reversing the driving condition, not mere silence. Coverage had already gone mainstream-saturated (JPMorgan/frenzy) last week, and now the catalyst itself is dead with names selling off. Edge gone.

2024-11-22.thesis: RFK Jr named to lead HHS threatens vaccine makers
2024-11-22.exit_case: none — RFK Jr nomination just announced, Senate confirmation and any actual vaccine policy action still entirely ahead
2024-11-22.assessment: RFK Jr's HHS nomination is a specific, datable shock directly tied to vaccine makers — CSL already tumbled on the news, and the press explicitly names healthcare/vaccine investors as the losers. The catalyst is early: Senate confirmation is still ahead, and no actual policy (approval reviews, funding cuts, mandate rollbacks) has landed. This is under-the-radar with a clean bearish read on the vaccine basket. Vehicles are the direct pure-plays exposed to a hostile HHS: PFE, MRNA, BNTX, NVAX, CSLLY.
2024-11-22.exit_advice: Hold — this is week one of a fresh, specific catalyst: a named vaccine skeptic tapped for HHS with confirmation and policy actions still pending.

2024-12-27.thesis: China bans antimony, gallium, germanium exports to US
2024-12-27.exit_case: Ban announced Dec 3 already public, but curbs remain in force — no reversal
2024-12-27.assessment: Entry week. China's ban on antimony, gallium, germanium exports to the US is a specific, datable supply-shock catalyst now in force, with press explicitly tying it to critical-minerals disruption (disc brakes, armor-piercing rounds, coatings). This is a structural export-curb regime, not a one-time closed event — it should keep generating milestones (US stockpiling, domestic mine funding, retaliation). UAMY is the cleanest antimony pure-play; PPTA (Perpetua antimony/gold) a direct domestic-supply peer; MP the broader critical-minerals reshoring proxy. Still early and under-the-radar — coverage is explanatory ('why it matters to you'), not saturated. Keep the full basket.
2024-12-27.exit_advice: Hold — China's export ban on antimony/gallium/germanium is a standing curb regime driving Western supply-chain reshoring; exit only if curbs lifted.
